description: Sample pipeline that attaches to an already-running Chrome instance via CDP (Chrome DevTools Protocol). Useful when the user has manually started Chrome with --remote-debugging-port=9222 and authenticated through device-restricted SSO that cannot be automated.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type + export_as.

params.message: Connected to active browser via CDP on port 9222. Inspecting the active tab...
